metadata.name: GitHub Patterns Marketplace
metadata.description: Production-grade catalog of governance assets, Copilot agents, issue strategy templates, and CI baselines.

github_100_percent.description: Five-phase repository governance model from collaboration baseline to intelligence operations.

A.name: Collaboration Base
A.objective: Establish contribution rules and issue operations foundation.

B.name: Merge Governance
B.objective: Apply repository governance orchestration and merge discipline.

C.name: CI/CD & Quality
C.objective: Introduce workflow automation, linting, and conditional test execution.

D.name: Advanced Security
D.objective: Strengthen security controls and policy-driven hardening.

E.name: Intelligence & MCP
E.objective: Enable Copilot instructions, specialized agents, and LLM-facing intelligence.

nodejs.description: Recommended assets for Node.js and TypeScript repositories.

python.description: Recommended assets for Python service and API repositories.

laravel.description: Recommended assets for Laravel repositories focused on architecture, security, and testability.

vuejs.description: Recommended assets for Vue 3 front-end repositories with strong architecture and state governance.

agent-factory.description: Meta-agent for creating new specialist agents (.agent.md) following high-performance standards.

repo-architect.description: Marketplace setup orchestrator. Configures governance, agents, and rules based on the stack and the GitHub 100% guide.

issue-ops-architect.description: Workflow strategy specialist that installs the best-fit issue templates for each team maturity model.

project-auditor.description: Gap analysis specialist against engineering standards.

security-infra-expert.description: Phase D specialist for auditing and preparing GitHub native security configuration with CodeQL, Dependabot, and secret-leak safeguards.

laravel-expert.description: Laravel specialist for architecture, data access, security boundaries, and phased remediation guidance.

vue-architect.description: Vue specialist for component architecture, state strategy, and performance-focused remediation planning.

asset-factory.description: Repository-internal factory agent for creating and improving assets with subagent workflows.

asset-review-board.description: Repository-internal multi-lens review board agent for artifact quality gates.

registry-schema-governor.description: Repository-internal governor for registry and schema coherence and compatibility.

documentation-steward.description: Repository-internal documentation steward for en and pt-br consistency.

prompt-studio.description: Repository-internal prompt engineering agent with measurable output contracts.

rule-distiller.description: Specialist agent that distills long technical docs into procedural instruction rules, grouped as Breaking Changes and Novas Boas Práticas.

copilot-instructions-base.description: Core engineering principles: Immutability, DRY, KISS, TDD, and Conventional Commits.

contributing-baseline.description: Baseline CONTRIBUTING.md for Copilot-managed repositories with AI agent workflow guidelines.

php-standards-laravel.description: Focused PHP and Laravel instruction set for typing, validation, security, and testing discipline.

copilot-operating-model.description: Repository-internal AI operating model with mandatory subagent development workflow.

ci-pipeline-base.description: Language-aware CI baseline with Super Linter and conditional Node/Python test execution.

marketplace-integrity.description: Internal workflow that validates registry.json against its JSON Schema and verifies that all asset paths referenced in the registry exist in the repository. Not intended for distribution to consumer repos.

minimalist.description: Low-friction templates for solo developers, prototypes, and fast MVP loops.

open-source.description: Community-first templates with duplicate prevention and triage clarity.

agile-scrum.description: Sprint-driven templates with stories, tasks, epics, and definition-of-done discipline.

kanban-devops.description: Continuous-delivery templates with incident response, RFCs, and technical debt tracking.

enterprise-safe.description: Enterprise governance templates for compliance, auditability, traceability, and security remediation.

shape-up.description: Templates for betting cycles, appetite-based scoping, and rabbit-hole management.

code-design.title: Code Design & Logic
code-design.description: Principles for immutability, clarity, KISS, and maintainability.

architecture.title: Architecture Patterns
architecture.description: System design guidance for layering, separation of concerns, and scalability.

testing.title: Testing Excellence
testing.description: Testing standards including AAA, TDD discipline, and boundary coverage.

security.title: Security Hardening
security.description: Guidelines for secure coding, secrets prevention, and trust boundaries.

documentation.title: Documentation & ADR
documentation.description: Documentation quality, architecture decision records, and knowledge durability.

performance.title: Performance & Scalability
performance.description: Performance measurement, optimization discipline, and scalable architecture practices.

collaboration.title: AI Collaboration Governance
collaboration.description: Rules for multi-agent collaboration, handoff quality, and human oversight.

agent-error-contract.title: Agent Error Contract
agent-error-contract.description: Standard error envelope and escalation policy for repository AI agents.

agent-observability.title: Agent Observability
agent-observability.description: Decision logging and evidence requirements for AI agent workflows.

llms-index.description: LLM-facing index for repository navigation and context.

prompt-create-or-improve-agent.description: Operational prompt for creating or improving agent artifacts.

prompt-review-and-harden-agent.description: Operational prompt for agent hardening and severity-based review.

prompt-update-registry-and-schema.description: Operational prompt for coherent registry and schema updates.

prompt-create-or-improve-documentation.description: Operational prompt for documentation updates with source-of-truth checks.

prompt-create-stack-bundle.description: Operational prompt for stack bundle creation and registry integration.

prompt-full-ai-iteration-workflow.description: Operational prompt for complete AI iteration cycles with nested subagents.
